privileged_info_summary: Task requires creation of a Data Asset record in Eramba GRC with title 'Customer Loyalty Program Database'. The asset description must include these terms: 'personal data', 'loyalty', 'PostgreSQL', and 'EU-West-1'. The data is stored in the 'data_assets' MySQL table. Eramba is an open-source GRC application running in Docker with MySQL 8.4 backend. All data is synthetic test environment data created during agent task execution.
